title: Lifting State
description: Pass a callback function to a child widget to trigger state changes in the parent.
problemStatement:
Communication between widgets! Create a parent widget that holds a `String status`. Create a child widget `StatusButton` that takes a `VoidCallback onToggle` as a constructor parameter.

**Requirement:** When the child button is pressed, the parent should update its status to `"Active"`.
hints: Pass the function from parent to child: `StatusButton(onToggle: () => setState(...))`.
expectedOutput: The parent's text changes when the child's button is clicked.
